message:
Command `
# Check the synthesis report to understand what was synthesized vs black-boxed
cat /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis/openroad-yosys.log 2>/dev/null | grep -E "blackbox|black_box|Blackbox|module .* black" | head -20
echo "==="
# What does the synthesis log say about which modules were synthesized
grep -E "Executing|Synthesis report|Number of cells|blackbox" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis/openroad-yosys.log 2>/dev/null | head -30
echo "==="
# Check the yosys stat output
grep -A 5 "=== design hierarchy ===" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis/openroad-yosys.log 2>/dev/null | head -30` executed with exit code 0.
